brand.name: Radeion.ai
brand.description: A B2B healthcare intelligence platform for payers, providers, ACOs, employers, and public programs that need clinically grounded analytics, automation, and quality assurance.

hero.title: Unify clinical decisions, risk analytics, and operational assurance in one AI-ready platform.
hero.body: Radeion helps healthcare organizations convert fragmented claims, clinical, and workflow data into explainable insight, governed automation, and measurable quality programs.

metrics.label: Enterprise segments supported
metrics.detail: Payer, provider, ACO, employer, and government workflows

metrics.label: Core product modules
metrics.detail: From risk analytics to revenue cycle intelligence

metrics.label: AI evaluation checkpoints
metrics.detail: Model quality, traceability, bias review, and clinical QA gates

metrics.label: Integration patterns
metrics.detail: FHIR, HL7, claims exports, SSO, and warehouse syncs

products.name: Risk Analytics
products.summary: Risk scoring, documentation review, and performance intelligence for value-based care teams.
products.problem: Risk teams often reconcile coding, documentation, and financial exposure across disconnected systems.
products.aiEvaluation: AI-assisted signals are scored against documentation confidence, model drift, reviewer agreement, and audit traceability before being surfaced.

products.name: Clinical Decision Support
products.summary: Evidence-aligned order sets, care pathways, and next-best-action prompts for clinical teams.
products.problem: Clinical guidance loses value when it is detached from the workflow where care decisions happen.
products.aiEvaluation: Recommendations are evaluated for guideline alignment, source freshness, patient-context fit, and escalation requirements.

products.name: Population Health
products.summary: Dashboards that identify cohorts, gaps in care, utilization patterns, and quality trends.
products.problem: Population programs need a reliable way to move from broad trends to the exact cohorts that need action.
products.aiEvaluation: Cohort suggestions are checked for data completeness, fairness indicators, and repeatable measure logic.

products.name: Fraud, Waste & Abuse Detection
products.summary: Explainable anomaly detection for claims, billing patterns, and provider network behavior.
products.problem: Program integrity teams need to detect suspicious behavior without creating opaque black-box investigations.
products.aiEvaluation: Detection models are evaluated for precision, false-positive burden, explainability, and reviewer feedback loops.

products.name: Care Management
products.summary: Care-team worklists, chronic condition tracking, and intervention orchestration.
products.problem: Care managers need context-rich, prioritized worklists instead of static reports that age quickly.
products.aiEvaluation: Prioritization is tested against clinical relevance, timeliness, care-team feedback, and actionability.

products.name: Revenue Cycle Analytics
products.summary: Denial trends, prior authorization intelligence, and reimbursement performance visibility.
products.problem: Revenue teams need to understand where avoidable denials, coding friction, and authorization delays originate.
products.aiEvaluation: Revenue insights are assessed for source traceability, policy match, historical consistency, and review confidence.

solutions.name: Payers & Health Plans
solutions.summary: Improve risk, quality, network, utilization, and program integrity decisions across health plan operations.

solutions.name: Health Systems & Hospitals
solutions.summary: Support clinical decision-making, quality programs, documentation, and operational review across care settings.

solutions.name: ACOs & Value-Based Care
solutions.summary: Coordinate performance across attributed lives, risk contracts, care gaps, and provider engagement.

solutions.name: Self-Insured Employers
solutions.summary: Understand healthcare spend, program performance, and workforce health trends without direct patient engagement.

solutions.name: Government & Medicaid
solutions.summary: Modernize public program analytics with governed workflows, transparent quality measurement, and audit-ready reporting.

caseStudies.title: Health plan risk review concept
caseStudies.result: Earlier visibility into documentation gaps using AI-evaluated review queues.

caseStudies.title: Clinical pathway governance concept
caseStudies.result: A structured review model for keeping care pathways aligned with current guidance.

caseStudies.title: ACO population intelligence concept
caseStudies.result: Unified care-gap, risk, and utilization views for attributed populations.

demo.title: See how Radeion would fit your organization
demo.body: Share the workflow you want to improve. The current form saves mock submissions locally in JSON for review until the email engine is added.
